name: encore-lite
description: The end-of-cycle surprise builder, free edition. Before your usage resets, Encore Lite reads what you worked on all month and builds one bonus deliverable you didn't get to — or didn't think of — in time. The full Encore at encoreplugin.com adds worked playbooks, the request line, tidy mode, usage-meter pacing, the unveiling delivery, and packs for ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.
